title: Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A classic Spanish dish made with chicken, paella rice, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the buttery in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the paella rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, tomato paste, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered.
Cook for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the paella with a fork and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
